all.en: Dear valued subscriber, this is a friendly reminder about your account.
all.zh: 親愛的訂閱者，這是關於您帳戶的友善提醒。

all.en: Your annual subscription to Horizon Business Magazine will expire on June 15.
all.zh: 您訂閱的《Horizon 商業雜誌》年度訂閱將於六月十五日到期。

all.en: We would hate for you to miss any of our upcoming feature articles.
all.zh: 我們不希望您錯過任何即將推出的專題報導。

all.en: Renewing today ensures uninterrupted delivery of every weekly issue.
all.zh: 今日續訂可確保每週刊物不間斷送達。

all.en: You can renew online in less than two minutes through our customer portal.
all.zh: 您可以透過顧客平台在兩分鐘內完成線上續訂。

all.en: Simply log in using your registered email and current password.
all.zh: 只需以您註冊的電子郵件與目前密碼登入即可。

all.en: Under the account tab, click the orange Renew Now button.
all.zh: 在帳戶頁面下，點選橘色的「立即續訂」按鈕。

all.en: You can choose between a one-year or two-year subscription plan.
all.zh: 您可以選擇一年或兩年的訂閱方案。

all.en: The two-year option offers savings of 20 percent over the standard rate.
all.zh: 兩年方案較標準價可節省百分之二十。

all.en: As an existing subscriber, you also qualify for a loyalty discount.
all.zh: 身為現有訂戶，您還可享有忠誠顧客折扣。

all.en: Use the promo code LOYAL26 at checkout to receive an additional 10 percent off.
all.zh: 結帳時輸入優惠碼 LOYAL26 可再享百分之十折扣。

all.en: If you renew before June 1, you will receive a complimentary digital archive pass.
all.zh: 若您在六月一日前續訂，將獲贈免費數位典藏通行證。

all.en: This pass grants access to more than ten years of past issues.
all.zh: 此通行證可讓您閱覽超過十年的過刊內容。

all.en: Our subscribers consistently rank our coverage as the most insightful in the industry.
all.zh: 我們的訂戶持續評價我們的報導為業界最具洞見。

all.en: Upcoming features include exclusive interviews with leading global executives.
all.zh: 即將推出的專題包含與全球頂尖高階主管的獨家專訪。

all.en: We will also publish a special report on the future of remote work.
all.zh: 我們也將發布一份關於遠距工作未來的特別報導。

all.en: If you wish to update your delivery address, please do so before renewing.
all.zh: 如需更新寄送地址，請於續訂前完成修改。

all.en: Digital-only subscribers can manage notification settings on the same page.
all.zh: 純數位訂戶可在同一頁面管理通知設定。

all.en: Should you have any billing questions, our team is ready to assist.
all.zh: 若您有任何帳務問題，我們的團隊隨時樂意協助。

all.en: You can reach us by email at support@horizonmag.com any day of the week.
all.zh: 您可隨時透過電子郵件 support@horizonmag.com 與我們聯繫。

all.en: Phone support is also available from 9 a.m. to 6 p.m. on weekdays.
all.zh: 電話客服平日上午九點至下午六點亦提供服務。

all.en: We truly appreciate your continued readership and support over the years.
all.zh: 我們衷心感謝您多年來持續訂閱與支持。

all.en: We hope you will choose to remain part of the Horizon community.
all.zh: 希望您繼續成為 Horizon 社群的一員。

all.en: Thank you, and we look forward to serving you for another year.
all.zh: 謝謝您，期待再為您服務一年。

all.en: Auto-renewal can be enabled in your account settings to prevent any future lapses in service.
all.zh: 您可在帳戶設定中啟用自動續訂，避免日後服務中斷。

all.en: Gift subscriptions are now available, perfect for colleagues and business partners.
all.zh: 禮品訂閱方案現已推出，非常適合贈送同事與商業夥伴。

all.en: Each gift subscription includes a personalized message card delivered with the first issue.
all.zh: 每份禮品訂閱皆附上個人化祝福卡片，隨首期刊物寄出。

all.en: Our editorial team is launching a monthly podcast for premium subscribers next quarter.
all.zh: 編輯團隊將於下一季為高級訂戶推出每月一集的播客節目。

all.en: Corporate accounts qualify for bulk pricing on subscriptions of ten copies or more.
all.zh: 企業帳戶訂購十份以上可享有大宗訂閱優惠價。

all.en: Tax-deductible receipts are issued automatically for all business-related purchases.
all.zh: 所有商業相關採購將自動開立可抵稅的收據。

all.en: Premium tier subscribers gain early access to our exclusive industry conference tickets.
all.zh: 高級訂戶可優先取得我們獨家產業論壇門票的購買機會。

all.en: Please review your subscriber profile to ensure your contact information remains current.
all.zh: 請檢視您的訂戶資料，確保聯絡資訊維持最新狀態。

all.en: Loyal readers celebrating ten years with us will receive a commemorative leather portfolio.
all.zh: 訂閱屆滿十年的忠實讀者將獲贈紀念版皮質文件夾。

all.en: Warm regards from the entire team at Horizon Business Magazine.
all.zh: Horizon 商業雜誌全體同仁致上誠摯問候。

all.en: Reader advisory panels offer engaged subscribers a chance to influence upcoming editorial themes.
all.zh: 讀者顧問小組提供熱心訂戶機會，影響未來的編輯主題方向。

all.en: Our digital archive search engine has been upgraded to deliver results in under one second.
all.zh: 我們的數位典藏搜尋引擎已升級，可在一秒內呈現搜尋結果。

all.en: Subscribers can download high-resolution charts and infographics for use in their own presentations.
all.zh: 訂戶可下載高解析度圖表與資訊圖，供個人簡報使用。

all.en: Annual contributor awards recognize industry experts who have shaped our most popular articles.
all.zh: 年度撰稿人獎將表揚形塑本刊最受歡迎文章的產業專家。

all.en: Family plans allow up to four members at the same household to share a single subscription.
all.zh: 家庭方案允許同一住址的最多四位成員共用單一訂閱。

all.en: International readers may now choose currency preferences for billing during account setup.
all.zh: 國際讀者於設定帳戶時可選擇計費的幣別偏好。

all.en: Industry whitepapers prepared by our research team will be released exclusively to active subscribers.
all.zh: 本研究團隊撰寫的產業白皮書將獨家提供給有效訂戶。

all.en: Our customer success team is available via live chat during all standard business hours weekdays.
all.zh: 我們的顧客成功團隊於平日上班時間皆提供線上即時諮詢服務。

all.en: Refer a colleague program rewards both parties with one month of complimentary premium access.
all.zh: 推薦同事方案讓推薦人與被推薦人皆可獲得一個月免費高級訂閱。

all.en: We remain committed to delivering trusted business insight directly into your inbox each week.
all.zh: 我們將持續致力於每週把可信賴的商業洞察直接送進您的信箱。

all.en: I almost let my subscription lapse last year, and I genuinely missed reading it on Sunday mornings.
all.zh: 我去年差點讓訂閱過期，後來才發現週日早上沒得讀真的會懷念。

all.en: My boss recommended this magazine during my first week, and I have been a subscriber ever since.
all.zh: 我老闆在我到職第一週推薦這本雜誌給我，從那之後我就一直訂到現在。

all.en: Have you tried using the digital archive to research a topic for an old college reunion talk?
all.zh: 你有沒有試過用數位典藏查資料準備老同學聚會的演講？

all.en: I always renew during the two-year promo because I forget about deadlines if I leave it too long.
all.zh: 我每次都選兩年方案，因為時間拖太久我一定會忘記到期日。

all.en: My husband loves the printed copy, while I much prefer reading articles on my morning commute.
all.zh: 我先生喜歡看紙本，我則比較喜歡通勤時用手機讀文章。

all.en: I gifted a subscription to my younger sister when she started her first management role last spring.
all.zh: 去年春天我妹剛升上主管職時，我送了她一份訂閱當作禮物。

all.en: Once I waited until the actual expiration date and lost a week of issues before customer service helped.
all.zh: 有一次我拖到真的到期當天，結果中斷一週才被客服救回來。

all.en: The exclusive podcast episodes have become part of my Saturday morning routine while I do laundry.
all.zh: 獨家播客節目已經變成我週六早上邊洗衣服邊聽的固定行程。

all.en: I keep the commemorative leather portfolio on my desk even though I rarely actually put papers in it.
all.zh: 那個紀念皮夾我一直放在桌上，雖然其實很少真的拿來裝文件。

all.en: Just a friendly tip: enable auto-renewal so you never panic the night before a flight again.
all.zh: 小提醒：記得開啟自動續訂，免得搭飛機前一晚才在那邊手忙腳亂。
